title: Tool-Augmented Agent for Closed-loop Optimization,Simulation,and Modeling Orchestration
optimized_headline: Revolutionary Tool Enhances Closed-Loop Optimization and Simulation Efficiency

raw_body:
arXiv:2605.20190v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Iterative industrial design-simulation optimization is bottlenecked by the CAD-CAE semantic gap: translating simulation feedback into valid geometric edits under diverse, coupled constraints. To fill this gap, we propose COSMO-Agent (Closed-loop Optimization, Simulation, and Modeling Orchestration), a tool-augmented reinforcement learning (RL) framework that teaches LLMs to complete the closed-loop CAD-CAE process. Specifically, we cast CAD generation, CAE solving, result parsing, and geometry revision as an interactive RL environment, where an LLM learns to orchestrate external tools and revise parametric geometries until constraints are satisfied. To make this learning stable and industrially usable, we design a multi-constraint reward that jointly encourages feasibility, toolchain robustness, and structured output validity. In addition, we contribute an industry-aligned dataset that covers 25 component categories with executable CAD-CAE tasks to support realistic training and evaluation. Experiments show that COSMO-Agent training substantially improves small open-source LLMs for constraint-driven design, exceeding large open-source and strong closed-source models in feasibility, efficiency, and stability.
speedrun: Researchers have introduced COSMO-Agent, a tool-augmented reinforcement learning framework aimed at optimizing industrial design simulations. This system addresses the challenges of translating simulation feedback into actionable geometric changes. It uses a multi-constraint reward system to ensure that designs meet various requirements effectively. This advancement could significantly enhance the efficiency of design processes in industries reliant on CAD and CAE technologies.
why_it_matters: COSMO-Agent could streamline workflows for engineers, making it easier to translate simulation results into practical design changes.
The introduction of this framework indicates a shift towards more integrated AI tools in industrial design, potentially reshaping how companies approach product development.

lenses.eli12: COSMO-Agent is like a smart assistant that helps engineers make better designs by learning from simulations. It improves how design feedback is turned into real changes, making the process smoother. This matters because it could help industries create better products faster and with fewer errors.
lenses.pm: For product managers, COSMO-Agent represents a way to enhance design efficiency and reduce costs by automating complex feedback loops. By meeting various constraints effectively, it could lead to quicker iterations and improved product quality, allowing teams to focus on innovation rather than troubleshooting.
lenses.engineer: COSMO-Agent employs a reinforcement learning approach to optimize the CAD-CAE workflow, addressing the semantic gap in design feedback. With a multi-constraint reward system, it improves the feasibility and stability of design outputs. Experiments show that it outperforms both large open-source and strong closed-source models in efficiency, highlighting its potential for real-world applications.
